title: Wrangell’s Tlingit Phrase of the Week
summary: January, Canada goose month. Pertains to the geese that stay around all winter. The sun begins to turn back. In the month of January, we dig clams. In the month of January, we steam shrimp. In the month of January, we gather cottonwood tips. In the month of January, we eat our food. In the month of January, king salmon are coming in. February, black bear month. Young are born. In the mo...

title: AST Assault & Drowning Close Call: Wasilla [AK25055906]
summary: On 06/10/2025 at approximately 1541 hours, Alaska State Troopers responded to Cloudy Lake in Meadow Lakes for a report of a drowning in progress. Troopers quickly arrived on scene, entered the lake, and successfully rescued the juvenile. Further investigation revealed the juvenile was a victim of a recent assault and was fleeing from the suspect. Investigation is ongoing and charges are expected to be filed with Dept. Juvenile Justice.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: SNC’s 2025 Elders of the Year
summary: Join us in congratulating our 2025 Elders of the Year! The Sitnasuak Elder of the Year Award recognizes Shareholders who have demonstrated dedication to the well-being of Sitnasuak and its Shareholders. This award is presented annually to one male and one female Elder Shareholder who demonstrate the...

title: Alaska Under Attack: The Four-Front Fight for Our Public Lands
summary: Let’s not sugarcoat it: Alaska is in the crosshairs. From the edges of the Arctic Ocean to the old-growth of the Tongass, the Trump administration is launching a full-scale attack on some of the wildest places left in America. They’re gutting protections, fast-tracking drilling and logging, and tossing aside Indigenous rights and climate science—all to give extractive industries one last payday. It’s overwhelming by design. When there’s no real strategy, chaos becomes the playbook. But we know how to fight tactless chaos: with collective action and an unshakable commitment to protecting what matters most. Be...

title: AST Disorderly Conduct: Fairbanks [AK25055655]
summary: On June 9th, 2025, Troopers responded to two separate reports of a man, later identified as Kane Evan, in the roadway near Little Shot and the Parks Highway with a dog. title: AST Warrant Arrest: Fairbanks [AK25049313]
summary: On 06/10/2025 at approximately 0324 hours a Trooper identified Kern Brand at the Circle K gas station off Johansen Expressway. Brand had a no bail warrant for his arrest. Brand was arrested without incident and remanded at FCC for remand.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Assault 4 & Resisting Arrest: Palmer [AK25055661]
summary: On 6/9/2025 at approximately 2328 hours, AST received a report of an assault at a residence off Church St in Palmer. Investigation revealed that Starr Richards, 38 YOA, had physically assaulted a family member. Richards was arrested and remanded to MSPT, where she was held without bail.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch
